scope: Keep direct X posts that are self-contained enough to support a person viewpoint, workflow note, or product-specific AI signal. These decisions only write keep QAAuditLog rows.

target.objectLabel: The team is fast! It's been super exciting to see le Chat more and more widely adopted.

decisions.reason: Direct post from Arthur Mensch's X source about Mistral's Le Chat adoption and roadmap; short but person-authored and product-specific.

target.objectLabel: Mistral Medium 2 was Miqu by the way

target.objectLabel: Each tab has its own git checkout; Claude manages context

target.objectLabel: It really depends on the language, and each model gets better and better at it.
